overview:
## Discussion

This hash can be used as a unique identifier to recognize this specific code in the future. This identifier is tied to the current version of the code, unlike the [doc://com.apple.security/documentation/Security/kSecCodeInfoIdentifier] identifier, which remains stable across developer-approved updates. If you are not passing this hash in the attribute dictionary when you call the [doc://com.apple.security/documentation/Security/SecHostCreateGuest] function, then you must pass the [doc://com.apple.security/documentation/Security/kSecCSGenerateGuestHash] flag to the function as well.

# kSecGuestAttributeHash

**Global Variable**

A key whose value is a data object containing the SHA-1 hash of the code directory.

## Declaration

```swift
let kSecGuestAttributeHash: CFString
```

## Discussion

This hash can be used as a unique identifier to recognize this specific code in the future. This identifier is tied to the current version of the code, unlike the [doc://com.apple.security/documentation/Security/kSecCodeInfoIdentifier] identifier, which remains stable across developer-approved updates. If you are not passing this hash in the attribute dictionary when you call the [doc://com.apple.security/documentation/Security/SecHostCreateGuest] function, then you must pass the [doc://com.apple.security/documentation/Security/kSecCSGenerateGuestHash] flag to the function as well.
title: kSecGuestAttributeHash
